title: ApprovalDecision
description: Payload for approval_granted and approval_denied evidence events (v0.3.5). Records the capability URI and the identity of the actor who made the decision.

capability_uri.description: The capability URI that was approved or denied (e.g. 'my.capability:1.0.0').

decided_by.description: Identity of the actor granting or denying the approval. Free-form string (user ID, service account, etc.).

note.description: Optional human-readable note attached to an approval_granted event.

reason.description: Optional human-readable reason attached to an approval_denied event.
